name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Delete Application Log
notes:
This Building Block detects deletion of log files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: TeamViewer Log File Deleted
SIGMA Description: Detects the deletion of the TeamViewer log files which may indicate an attempt to destroy forensic evidence


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Delete Application Log on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of log
when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of TeamViewer_
when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Delete Application Log on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of log
AND when the event matches Filename (custom) is any of TeamViewer_
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe
